title: Doruk's Shader
description: Doruk's Shader is a Semi-Realistic Shader.
body:
Tired of shaders that either turn your Minecraft world into a cheap, plastic cartoon or completely melt your GPU just to render a few trees? Say hello to Doruk's Shader, a premium, meticulously optimized semi-realistic shaderpack designed to transform your Minecraft experience into a breathtaking visual masterpiece, all while preserving the game's core vanilla essence.

Whether you are exploring deep caves, building massive bases, or just watching the sunset over a pixelated horizon, Doruk’s Shader delivers next-gen visuals without the next-gen hardware tax.
